name: zeus-rpg-promptkit
description: Evidence and Investigation Platform for IBM i — turn source, metadata and runtime evidence into reproducible, review-ready artifacts with humans in control.

scripts.build: echo "No build step required for this CLI project"
scripts.typecheck:verify-scope:
node -e '
const fs=require("fs"); const txt=fs.readFileSync("jsconfig.json","utf8").replace(/\/\*[\s\S]*?\*\//g,"").replace(/\/\/[^\n]*/g,""); const cfg=JSON.parse(txt); const files=cfg.files||[]; if(files.length<3){ console.error("ERROR: typecheck scope shrank below declared core"); process.exit(1); } console.log("typecheck scope verified ("+files.length+" declared)");'
scripts.test: npm run test:ci && npm run test:corpus && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:contract && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:contract: node scripts/run-tests.js tests/analyze-run-manifest.test.js tests/bundle-manifest.test.js tests/fetch-readability-contract.test.js tests/ai-knowledge-projection.test.js tests/task-oriented-analysis-index.test.js tests/workflow-presets.test.js tests/schema-registry.test.js
